comments.author: @AmazingDiscoveriesTopUS
comments.text: Spain legalized public niduty on many beaches, yet still fines people for walking shirtless in town. Freedom.. or double standards?

comments.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
comments.text: "The sand is yours, the sidewalk is not"—truer words were never spoken! 😂 The first time I saw a fine handed out 50 meters off the beach in Barcelona, it all clicked.

replies.author: @Outland_US
replies.text: Haha, Barcelona doesn’t play around! Those strict rules actually keep their cities pristine. With such high standards, many consider Spain perfect for retirement planning. Would you still choose to retire there despite these crazy fines?
